# Code

When you can work on your computer and when you need to work on the cluster .. source , RAM, etc. - number of samples?

```{r}
# Notas
a <- 3
b <- 2
suma <- a + b
suma 
```

```{r, eval=FALSE}
InstallData("pbmc3k")
data("pbmc3k")
pbmc3k
```

```{r, eval=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(palmerpenguins)
penguins |>                                      # <1>
  mutate(                                        # <2>
    bill_ratio = bill_depth_mm / bill_length_mm, # <2>
    bill_area  = bill_depth_mm * bill_length_mm  # <2>
  )                                              # <2>
```

1.  Take `penguins`, and then,
2.  add new columns for the bill ratio and bill area.

``` text
video-game-sales-r/
├── data/
│   └── vgsales.csv
├── scripts/
│   └── 01_analisis_videojuegos.R
├── figures/
│   ├── grafica_01.png
│   ├── grafica_02.png
│   └── grafica_final.png
├── ejercicio_videojuegos.qmd
└── README.md
```
